description: Email delivery and tracking service for sending transactional emails, monitoring delivery status, and analyzing engagement metrics through the Postmark API.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send a single transactional email to a recipient with optional tracking and categorization.

to_email.description: The recipient's email address where the message will be delivered.

subject.description: The subject line that appears in the recipient's inbox.

text_body.description: Plain text version of the email content for clients that don't support HTML.

html_body.description: HTML-formatted version of the email content for rich formatting and styling.

from_email.description: The sender's email address that appears in the From field.

tag.description: A label for categorizing and filtering emails in reports and analytics.

track_opens.description: Whether to track when recipients open the email (default: true).

track_links.description: Link click tracking mode: HtmlAndText (both formats), HtmlOnly, TextOnly, or None (default: HtmlAndText).

To.description: The recipient's email address that received the message.

SubmittedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the email was submitted to Postmark for delivery.

MessageID.description: Unique identifier assigned to this email message for tracking and reference.

ErrorCode.description: Numeric error code (0 indicates success, non-zero indicates failure).

Message.description: Status message indicating success (OK) or describing the error that occurred.

tools.name: send_email_batch
tools.description: Send multiple transactional emails in a single API request for improved efficiency (maximum 500 messages per batch).

messages.description: Collection of email message objects, each containing To, Subject, TextBody, HtmlBody, From, and Tag fields.

results.description: Delivery results for each email in the batch, maintaining the same order as the input.

To.description: The recipient's email address that received the message.

SubmittedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the email was submitted to Postmark for delivery.

MessageID.description: Unique identifier assigned to this email message for tracking and reference.

ErrorCode.description: Numeric error code (0 indicates success, non-zero indicates failure).

Message.description: Status message indicating success (OK) or describing the error that occurred.

tools.name: get_bounces
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about emails that failed to deliver due to hard bounces, soft bounces, or other delivery issues.

count.description: Maximum number of bounce records to return in the response (default: 100).

offset.description: Number of bounce records to skip for pagination (default: 0).

inactive.description: Filter bounces by active status (true for inactive bounces, false for active, null for all).

email_filter.description: Filter bounces by a specific recipient email address.

total_count.description: Total number of bounce records matching the filter criteria.

bounces.description: Collection of bounce records containing delivery failure details.

ID.description: Unique numeric identifier for this bounce record.

Type.description: Classification of the bounce (HardBounce for permanent failures, SoftBounce for temporary issues).

TypeCode.description: Numeric code representing the specific bounce type.

Name.description: Human-readable name describing the bounce reason.

Tag.description: A label for categorizing and filtering emails in reports and analytics.

MessageID.description: Unique identifier assigned to this email message for tracking and reference.

ServerID.description: Identifier of the Postmark server that processed this email.

Description.description: Detailed explanation of why the email bounced.

Details.description: Technical details from the receiving mail server about the bounce.

Email.description: The recipient's email address that bounced.

From.description: The sender's email address from the bounced message.

BouncedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the bounce occurred.

DumpAvailable.description: Whether a full SMTP dump of the bounce is available for debugging.

Inactive.description: Whether this email address has been deactivated due to repeated bounces.

CanActivate.description: Whether this bounced email address can be reactivated for future sending.

Subject.description: The subject line of the bounced email.

Content.description: Excerpt or full content of the bounced email message.

tools.name: get_outbound_stats
tools.description: Retrieve aggregated statistics about sent emails including delivery rates, engagement metrics, and bounce information.

tag.description: A label for categorizing and filtering emails in reports and analytics.

from_date.description: Start date for the statistics period in YYYY-MM-DD format.

to_date.description: End date for the statistics period in YYYY-MM-DD format.

Sent.description: Total number of emails successfully sent during the period.

HardBounces.description: Number of emails that permanently failed delivery due to invalid addresses or blocked domains.

SoftBounces.description: Number of emails that temporarily failed delivery due to full mailboxes or server issues.

TotalBounces.description: Combined count of all hard and soft bounces.

SpamComplaints.description: Number of recipients who marked the email as spam.

Opens.description: Total number of times emails were opened, including multiple opens by the same recipient.

UniqueOpens.description: Number of unique recipients who opened the email at least once.

TotalClicks.description: Total number of link clicks across all emails, including multiple clicks by the same recipient.

UniqueClicks.description: Number of unique recipients who clicked at least one link in the email.

Unsubscribes.description: Number of recipients who opted out of future emails.

Tracked.description: Number of emails that had tracking enabled for opens and clicks.

tools.name: get_message_opens
tools.description: Retrieve detailed tracking information about when and how recipients opened a specific email, including device, location, and engagement data.

message_id.description: Unique identifier assigned to this email message for tracking and reference.

count.description: Maximum number of open event records to return in the response (default: 100).

offset.description: Number of open event records to skip for pagination (default: 0).

total_count.description: Total number of open events recorded for this email message.

opens.description: Collection of open events with detailed recipient engagement information.

FirstOpen.description: Whether this was the first time the recipient opened this email.

Client.description: Information about the email client application used to open the message.

Name.description: Name of the email client (e.g., Gmail, Outlook).

Company.description: Company that develops the email client.

Family.description: Product family or category of the email client.

OS.description: Information about the operating system where the email was opened.

Name.description: Name of the operating system (e.g., iOS, Windows).

Company.description: Company that develops the operating system.

Platform.description: Device platform type (e.g., Desktop, Mobile, Webmail).

UserAgent.description: Raw user agent string from the recipient's email client.

ReadSeconds.description: Estimated number of seconds the recipient spent reading the email.

Geo.description: Geographic location information derived from the recipient's IP address.

CountryISOCode.description: Two-letter ISO country code where the email was opened.

Country.description: Full country name where the email was opened.

RegionISOCode.description: ISO code for the state or region where the email was opened.

Region.description: State or region name where the email was opened.

City.description: City name where the email was opened.

Zip.description: Postal code of the location where the email was opened.

Coords.description: Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the open location.

IP.description: IP address from which the email was opened.

MessageID.description: Unique identifier assigned to this email message for tracking and reference.

ReceivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the email was opened by the recipient.

Tag.description: A label for categorizing and filtering emails in reports and analytics.

Recipient.description: The recipient's email address who opened the message.
